comment: Fleet registry for the cold-start pinger (.github/workflows/coldstart-pinger.yml). Per run, each app gets a concurrent burst followed by side-by-side warm rounds. Every observation stores the edge POP, function region, expected region, CDN status, runner identity, batch ID, response size, and temperature evidence. Rust apps stamp temperature headers on every response; a Next.js page needs an HTML telemetry marker, while a CDN-cached page has no function cold start. Rust/Next.js pairs are hhh-rs/hhh-nextjs and react-todos/nextjs-todos.

apps.name: onenote-extractor
apps.note: page 303s to auth — page samples are timing-only by status

apps.name: hhh-nextjs
apps.note: Next.js baseline of hhh (bench branch) — the Rust/JS comparison pair for hhh-rs

apps.name: nextjs-todos
apps.note: Next.js todos comparator (benchmarks/apps/nextjs) — the pair for react-todos
